event_comments: Reviewed newsletter canonicalization wave 2026-03-21 (1994/1996 deep review) merged duplicate event 64c9eaeb-41ef-52a9-9741-0c2fdf25478d ("Walla Walla, WA Sacajawea Orienteering Club"). Reason: same-terrain duplicate with club text written into title. Notes: The Nov. 10, 1996 Bennington Lake event should use the terrain identity and SACO organizer.
